content.en:
Ye Tian, General Blood, General Motian, General Fengxing, the four major generals gathered here, and other generals and many peak masters arrived one by one.

Many True Ancestors sat down one by one in the main hall of the usual meeting, waiting for the arrival of the incarnation of the Wind King's consciousness.

That's right, the incarnation of the Wind King's consciousness will also come, just for this meeting.

Rumble!!!

The Wind King consciousness incarnation appeared, sitting on the highest throne, overlooking the many True Ancestors below.

"I've seen the Wind King!"

Many True Ancestors shouted in unison.

The Wind King nodded slightly, and then said, "You should know what is going on this time, yes, it is precisely because of the forbidden ancient well!"

Many True Ancestors, including Ye Tian, didn't know what the Forbidden Ancient Well represented, they only knew that the Heavenly Spirit Sect and the Konjac True Kingdom had been destroyed because of the Forbidden Ancient Well, and even many Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Spirit Sect had fallen and died.

"The Forbidden Ancient Well is actually a special treasure in the Dark Forbidden Domain, which contains a heaven and earth, and some forbidden treasures will be born, and the Forbidden Ancient Well can be completely transformed into a treasure similar to the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, for one party's forces, the value of the Forbidden Ancient Well is very large, and it is greater than the value of the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool!

The Wind King recounted.

As soon as he said this, many True Ancestors understood a little.

"Wind King, but just a forbidden ancient well, even if it is ten times more precious than the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, it will not let the Heavenly Spirit Sect destroy the sect, and even those Dao Ancestors have not let go. The loss of the forces that started must be not small, is this price too great?" a peak master asked.

"That's right, the value of a forbidden ancient well is indeed limited, but it represents a signal, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is not simple, or the domain boundary fragment that fell into the Daoshan Realm is not simple! Even the Domain Realm cannot give birth to the Forbidden Ancient Well, only the Dark Forbidden Domain has a Forbidden Ancient Well!"

Many True Ancestors suddenly looked solemn.

That's right, why did the Xuanxu Ancient Realm give birth to the Forbidden Ancient Well?

"Wind King, why is this?" the bloody general also asked curiously.

"If I'm not mistaken, the Void Ancient Realm has the potential to become a forbidden realm!" said the Wind King.

"What is the Forbidden Realm?"

The True Ancestors were even more confused.

The Wind King said: "The Forbidden Realm has always been a legend, and perhaps only the Domain Ancestors can know more about it. I only know that the Forbidden Realm has a stable dark forbidden power, and like the Dark Forbidden Realm, it can give birth to forbidden treasures, and even forbidden creatures! It is rumored that when Yu Zu was wandering in the dark taboo, he saw the fragments of the forbidden world. Of course, that's just a legend, and I don't know if it's true or not. But now, the Forbidden Ancient Well has been born in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, which shows that the Xuanxu Ancient Realm has the hope of becoming a Forbidden Realm! Perhaps in the near future, there will be forbidden treasures born in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and there are even treasures that are more precious than the Forbidden Ancient Well. Of course, if a forbidden creature is born, it will be a great catastrophe!"

Forbidden creatures are comparable to domain ancestors, once they are born, no one can stop them!

But the birth of a forbidden world is also a supreme opportunity!

"Why does the Xuanxu Ancient Realm have the potential to become a forbidden realm, isn't it a world born from the fusion of the fragments of the domain realm and the universe?" Ye Tian asked.

The Wind King guessed, "I guess this may have something to do with the Vast Sea Ancestor, or even the Domain Realm Shattering Battle. In the first place, why the Vast Sea Realm was attacked, maybe it was some kind of treasure from the Dark Forbidden Domain. And the Vast Sea Ancestor integrated that Arcana into the remaining one-third of the Domain, and forcibly threw the Domain Boundary into the Dark Forbidden Realm, just because he didn't want to leave the Arcana to those enemies. And it was precisely because of the existence of that supreme treasure that the Xuanxu Ancient Realm had the potential to become a forbidden realm. If you want to find the true reason, I'm afraid you still need to find those half-step domain ancestors in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and they may only know a little bit of the truth!"

The Wind King immediately said: "The content of this meeting is very simple, in addition to telling you about the Forbidden Ancient Realm and the Forbidden Realm, that is, to fight for the Forbidden Ancient Well with all your might. Even if you can't completely grasp the Forbidden Ancient Well, you still need to snatch the treasures inside the Forbidden Ancient Well as much as possible! The Heavenly Spirit Sect was destroyed, it should be that the Heavenly Spirit Sect got a forbidden treasure of unimaginable value, which attracted a certain Upper Triple Heaven Force to do it, it could be the three Nine Heavens Forces, or even the Heavenly Emperor Palace that had never met!"

"Yes!"

Many True Ancestors responded to the Tao.

They are also very eager for forbidden treasures, no matter what forbidden treasures they are, as long as they can get one, it will be a real big profit.

Ye Tian was also quite excited, the only forbidden treasure he had now was the Forbidden Black Lotus, and the Forbidden Black Lotus was still a pretty good forbidden treasure.

However, now the dark forbidden power inside the forbidden black lotus has been continuously absorbed and refined by him, and there is only less than forty percent of the dark forbidden power left.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, the Forbidden Black Lotus could at most support him to cultivate the Forbidden Body to the Xiaocheng realm, so it would be difficult to continue to help him improve.

If there was no treasure like the Forbidden Black Lotus, his Forbidden Body would have to enter the Dark Forbidden Domain if he wanted to progress, but in that case, it would not be realistic at all.

He couldn't just stay in the Dark Forbidden Realm and give up everything in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm in order to cultivate the forbidden body.

At present, there are countless opportunities in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, if you stay in the Dark Forbidden Domain, it will be a real delay in the improvement of strength!

Therefore, this time the Forbidden Ancient Well was a big opportunity for him, as long as he obtained a large number of forbidden treasures, he would not worry about the cultivation resources of the forbidden body.

Moreover, Black Wind Mountain does not force the True Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain to hand in forbidden strange things, if they hand in forbidden strange things, they can be exchanged for points of a certain value or other chances.

In short, all the treasures obtained in the forbidden ancient well, everything belongs to you.

On this side, the True Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain began to prepare, ready to go to the Forbidden Ancient Well at any time.

On the other side, alliance forces such as the Upper Triple Heaven Forces, the Middle Triple Heaven Forces, and even the Temple of the Gods also began to prepare the True Ancestor Army.

It can be imagined that once so many forces gather together and enter the forbidden ancient well, what a terrifying battle will break out.

In such a war where countless True Ancestors were fighting, even the Invincible True Ancestors had a great crisis of falling.

Ye Tian didn't let Xiao Yue go to the forbidden ancient well, it was not necessary, he asked Xiao Yue to guard the human race, take care of the children, and don't let them go out and run around.

And just like that, a few months passed.

this day.

The ruins of the Konjac True Kingdom have been lifted, and the major forces no longer prohibit others from entering the ruins of the Konjac True Kingdom.

----------------

The ruins of the real kingdom of konjac.

The entire True Kingdom was shattered, and there were void cracks everywhere as well as chaotic rules and traces left by the Dao Ancestors' hand-to-hand.

Many True Ancestors came in and were very surprised when they saw this scene.

What kind of terrible battle can destroy a true kingdom into ruins, and what treasures did those people find inside the forbidden ancient well?

Heavenly Sea Sect, Mitian Sect, Ten Thousand Domains Temple, Black Wind Mountain, Heavenly Sword Sect, King Kong City......

Countless forces poured into here, and each force had a large number of True Ancestors, and if you looked down from above the Endless Void, you could see a dense body of True Ancestors.

These forces did not act immediately, but watched around one by one, slowly approaching the forbidden ancient well.

Soon.

They came to the continent where the forbidden ancient well was located, but now that continent was in ruins, there was really a forbidden land left.

This forbidden land is the embodiment of the dark forbidden power that escapes from the forbidden ancient well, and it is a mortal place for the True Monarch and the creatures below, but for the True Ancestors, it can easily resist the power of the dark taboo.

After all, the power of the dark forbidden here is relatively mild, far less violent than the power of the dark forbidden in the dark forbidden realm.

"Let's go inside!"

The True Ancestors of the Heavenly Sea Sect, the Mitian Sect, and the Ten Thousand Domains Divine Temple were the first to enter the Forbidden Ancient Well, and other forces also entered one after another, and if they entered one step later, it would easily cause the treasure to be taken away by others.

In a short period of time, the true ancestors of a large number of forces all entered the Forbidden Ancient Well, and Ye Tian also followed the army of Black Wind Mountain into the Forbidden Ancient Well.
